programs.title: Married to Real Estate
programs.desc: For over a year, a couple raising a toddler have searched for their dream home; they turn to Egypt and Mike for help; Egypt finds the perfect place and is tasked with adding lots of color throughout the home to create a vibrant design style.

programs.title: Married to Real Estate
programs.desc: Clark Atlanta University calls on Egypt and Mike to renovate the president's box at their football stadium for homecoming; the space is vital for impressing donors, and with only three weeks, Egypt and Mike must deliver.

programs.title: Married to Real Estate
programs.desc: A couple's ready to transform their traditional townhome into something that suits the whole family; they're turning to Egypt and Mike to update their kitchen, living room and primary bath, and to also add a bedroom to the first floor.

programs.title: Good Bones
programs.desc: Mina and Karen are back in Fountain Square with a quaint but expensive cottage; in order to list this pricey property high enough to make a profit, they must figure out how to add plenty of bells and whistles without losing its vintage charm.

programs.title: Good Bones
programs.desc: In Near Eastside, Mina and Karen hope a two-story addition with an Americana cottage design will turn a heftier profit than the area's last project; after finding a series of mysterious holes, the team worries the home will become a money pit.

programs.title: Good Bones
programs.desc: Mina and Karen take a risk and purchase a huge house in a relatively new neighborhood; with one budget-busting issue after another, the team has to make money-saving design choices to create a neutral home that still has bombshell appeal.
